What We Do
Our Services

Concrete Protection

Residential · Commercial · Municipal

Professional concrete sealing and surface protection that enhances beauty and defends against Utah's toughest weather. We protect driveways, patios, sidewalks, pool decks, pavers, and more.

  • Salt & weather protection
  • UV & fade resistant coatings
  • Stain & oil resistant finish
  • Enhances appearance and curb appeal
  • Extends concrete life significantly
  • Premium deco products used on all jobs
Driveways · Patios · Sidewalks · Parking Lots · Parks & Rec

Protection Packages

Basic Protection
$0.85–$1.25 per sq ft
Surface cleaning · Standard sealer · Basic protection
⭐ Premium Protection
$1.25–$2.25 per sq ft
Deep cleaning · Crack touch-up · Premium deco sealer · Salt & enhanced finish
Decorative / Wet Look
$2.00–$4.00+ per sq ft
Color & wet look finish · Maximum protection
Get a Free Estimate →

Foundation Waterproofing

New Construction · Commercial

Stop water before it reaches your foundation. Our professional damp proofing and waterproofing solutions protect your foundation, prevent water damage, and preserve the value of your property.

  • Prevents water damage and intrusion
  • Creates a full waterproof barrier
  • Reduces moisture and humidity issues
  • Protects structural foundation integrity
  • Premium waterproof coating applied
  • Moisture barrier protection layer
New Construction · Commercial Buildings

Foundation Spraying

New Construction
$0.70–$1.50 per sq ft
Premium waterproof coating · Moisture barrier · Crack filling & repair
Commercial Construction
Custom Bid
Call for a free estimate — all commercial projects quoted individually
Call 435-994-5235 →

Crack Filling & Repair

Touch-Up Solutions

Minor cracks become major problems when left untreated. Our crack solutions stop moisture intrusion in its tracks and restore full structural integrity to walls and surfaces.

  • Seal minor cracks to stop moisture intrusion
  • Repair larger cracks and restore wall integrity
  • Prevents further cracking and expansion
  • Applied before sealing for best results
  • Available as a standalone or add-on service
Foundations · Driveways · Walls · Concrete Surfaces

Crack Services Pricing

Crack Filling
$4–$8+ per linear ft
Seal minor cracks, stop moisture intrusion
Crack Repair
$4–$8+ per linear ft
Repair larger cracks, restore structural integrity
Schedule an Inspection →

Pool Salt Shield

Pool Decks & Surrounding Areas

Salt chlorine pools are hard on surrounding concrete. Our Pool Salt Shield coating system protects pool decks from salt, chlorine, UV damage, and surface deterioration — keeping your pool area looking great for years.

  • Salt & chlorine protection
  • Reduces surface damage from pool chemicals
  • Extends concrete life in pool environments
  • Ideal for all pool area surfaces
  • UV resistant — won't fade or yellow
  • Slip-resistant finish options available
Pool Decks · Surrounding Patios · Coping Areas

Pool Salt Shield Pricing

Pool Salt Shield
$2.00–$5.00 per sq ft
Salt & chlorine protection · Surface damage reduction · Extends life
Calculate My Estimate →

Decorative / Wet Look

Premium Finish

Make your concrete look extraordinary. Our decorative and wet look finishes bring out the natural depth and color of concrete, stamped surfaces, and decorative patterns — with maximum protection built in.

  • Color enhancement and wet look finish
  • Maximum protection level
  • Premium appearance upgrade
  • Works on stamped, decorative, and plain concrete
  • Pavers and natural stone compatible
  • Deep surface cleaning and prep included
Stamped Concrete · Decorative Patios · Pavers · Stone

Decorative Pricing

Decorative / Wet Look
$2.00–$4.00+ per sq ft
Decorative enhancement · Color & wet look · Maximum protection
Get a Free Estimate →

Add-On Services

Enhance Your Project

Pair any of our sealing packages with these additional services for a complete protection solution. Ask about bundling when you request your free estimate.

  • Expansion joint sealing — $2–$4 per linear ft
  • Premium joint restoration — $4–$8+ per linear ft
  • Crack repair — $4–$8+ per linear ft
  • Oil & rust stain treatment — starting at $75
  • Pressure washing — starting at $0.20 per sq ft
Available as standalone or bundled with any package

5-Gallon Coverage Estimates

DECO 20 Clear (Concrete)1,200–1,500 sq ft
SilaCast BES (Pavers/Stone)700–1,000 sq ft
D2K Decorative Sealer1,000–1,200 sq ft
Salt Shield 3031,000–1,500 sq ft
TravaCast (Natural Stone)750–1,250 sq ft
Shine-A-Cast (High Shine)750–1,250 sq ft
Coverage varies based on surface condition and porosity.

Why Armour Crete
The Armour Crete Difference

Licensed & Fully Insured

Fully licensed, bonded, and insured. You're protected from start to finish.

Premium Deco Products

We use only top-tier, professional-grade sealants and coatings on every job.

Clean & Professional

We treat your property with respect. Clean job sites, courteous crews, every time.

Fast Response

We respond quickly and schedule free estimates at your convenience.

Fair Pricing

Transparent, competitive pricing with no hidden fees. Free estimates always.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We don't consider a job done until you're completely happy with the results.
